incident report (operational/cyber) — quendris utilities se (valence exchange se: vx), eu issuer

description of event: low-grade phishing emails detected on 2026-05-30; no systems compromised; already noted in the q2 operations update on our public newsroom

risk assessment: non-material for csrd reporting; no service disruption; reference: national cyber bulletin ccb-26-112 (public, fictional)

gdpr: personal data limited to role mailboxes (it-ops@quendris.example, privacy@quendris.example); no art 9 special-category data processed; purpose limitation and storage limitation observed

cross-border transfer: security logs mirrored to a processor in lydria (non-eea) under sccs v2.1; transfer impact assessment logged; local dpa informed via standard portal form (routine notification)

mar workflow: information assessed as not precise and not likely to significantly affect price; no delay decision required; insider list not opened at this stage

negated mac language: no mac/mae triggered under revolving credit facility; covenant position unchanged versus last published annual report

ir draft note: cyber paragraph for the q2 trading update is prepared with an embargo until 2026-07-15 08:00 cet for vx disclosure; internal distribution limited to comms and legal

public-source references: see quendris utilities se 2025 csrd report (pp. 34–35) and the cyber hygiene factsheet on the sustainability microsite (already available)

sfdr tie-in: no change to pai indicators; no adverse sustainability impacts identified for distributors of article 8 strategies; any broker research mentions expected to be generic

controls: mfa enforced; enterprise password reset completed; no vendor escalation; public helpline +00 000 000 000 and security@quendris.example (role inbox) available for inquiries

invalid identifiers (form placeholders only): isin ZZ0000000000, lei 000000FAKELEI42, account id 1234-XXXX-0000; placeholders not linked to an actual instrument

project-management notes: lower-case updates; backlog grooming tomorrow; spa-day voucher for ops team remains scheduled

board memo cross-reference: see operations committee paper oc-26-044 (archived, non-confidential) summarising the already-announced phishing trend

term sheet/definitive agreements: not applicable; no acquisition, disposal, or financing amendment contemplated in relation to this event

exchange/regulator context: vx rulebook thresholds for disclosure not met; courtesy note sent to continental securities authority (csa-eu) generic inbox for records
